abilities.name: Arrows of the Silent Eye
abilities.description: Each Arrow used gets special capability vs different targets (Piercing vs Armor, Burning, Weak CF, Paralyze, Fear/Slow).

abilities.name: Flurry of Arrows
abilities.description: May discard card to make three 1 AP Archery attacks vs different targets.

abilities.name: Wall of Arrows
abilities.description: When another character within a6 is targeted by attack, may discard card to use Archery vs attacker instead. TN 10.

actions: (1) Arrows of the Silent Eye (Archery) | AV: 5 (12) | Rg: z14 | Resist: Df | Target suffers 1/3/4 damage. Triggers determine effect vs armor/burning/weak/paralyze/fear. Capacity 8.
system.notes: Elite archers serving Ten Thunders. Tradition descending from Archers of Silent Eye. Masters of bow and martial arts. Wear eye-engraved helmets.
